title: The Coir Industry Act, 1953
full_text: The Coir Industry Act, 1953 कयर उद्योग अधिनियम, 1953 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1953-45 Act Number: 45 Enactment Date: 1953-12-23 Act Year: 1953 Short Title: The Coir Industry Act, 1953 Hindi Title: कयर उद्योग अधिनियम, 1953 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Board for the development of the Coir Industry and for that purpose to levy a customs duty on coir fiber, coir yarn and coir products exported from India and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Enforcement Date: 09-02-1954 Notification: 9th February, 1954, vide notification No. S.R.O. 470, dated 9th February, 1954, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part I, s. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Coir Industry Act, 1953 CHAPTER I PRELIMANARY CHAPER II THE COIR BOARD CHAPTER III CONTROL OVER THE EXPORT OF COIR FIBRE COIR YARD AND PRODUCTS CHAPTER IV FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER V CONTROL BY THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT CHAPTER VI MISCELLANOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of control by the Union. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and constitution of the Coir Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate acts and proceedings. Section 6. Salary and allowances of Chairman. Section 7. Vice-Chairman. Section 8. Executive and other Committees. Section 9. Secretary and staff. Section 10. Functions of the Board. Section 11. Dissolution of the Board. Section 12. Control of export of coir fibre, coir yarn and coir products. Section 13. Imposition of a duty of customs on export of coir fibre, coir yarn and coir products. Section 14. Payment of proceeds of cess to the Board. Section 14A. Grant by the Central Government to the Board. Section 15. Constitution of Fund. Section 16. Borrowing powers of Board. Section 17. Accounts and audit. Section 18. General control over acts and proceedings of the Board. Section 19. Report and returns. Section 20. Penalties. Section 21. Offences by companies. Section 22. Previous sanction of Central Government for prosecution. Section 23. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 24. Power to delegate. Section 25. Suspension of operation of Act. Section 26. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Power of Board to make by-laws.
